calendar.matters:
Petition To Encumber Asset Held In Endowment Trust
Off Calendar Jun-29-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Erik Dryburgh for Cogswell Polytechnical College. Kelvin Gong from the Attorney General's Office.

Discussions were held with regard to the current financial status of the College, the manner in which to proceed in order to save the College (bankruptcy/sale/loan), and the best interest to protect the students and the college. The Court granted the petition (order for the same signed).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

Petn For Instrn Re: Investment Of Endowment Trust
Off Calendar Dec-11-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Erik Dryburgh appearing for petitioner Foundation for Educational Achievement. Dr. Chad Cogswell is in Court. Court received a Statement of Non-opposition from the Attorney General's Office. Counsel has not received any opposition. Matter granted. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Karla Davis, CSR#12998. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.
